title: XAU (Tokenized Gold) had one of the most dramatic weeks on the crypto chart and it just flagged something interesting 👇
author: ChartSage
selftext:
From $4,500 it crashed hard to $4,100 on March 23 a 9% drop with massive volume. Then buyers completely absorbed the sell pressure and price recovered all the way to $4,620 by March 25. Now it's pulling back naturally to $4,390 and a Bullish TD Sequential Setup 9 just completed on the 2h chart right there.

Crash → recovery → new high → pullback → Setup 9. That's a full story in 5 days.

**I spotted this using ChartScout a free tool that automatically detects chart patterns across all crypto pairs 24/7.**



Not financial advice just sharing what the chart is showing. Anyone else watching gold this week? 👇
